improvement: The exact-commit Cloudflare environment preflight workflow now runs the independent artifact verifier against its own generated artifact set before upload.

verification.source_fetch: The committed workflow was updated through the GitHub contents API and returned commit b6c5333873adee9887d36fb965006a28334c7546.
workflow_behavior: builds the bounded preflight artifact set
runs verify-environment-preflight-run.mjs against the exact repository and commit
verification.provider_execution: No GitHub Actions workflow run was observable for the commit at evidence-record time.

privacy_boundary: The workflow validates required secret names and repository declarations only. It does not inspect or retain credential values.
claim_boundary: This improvement proves committed source wiring only until a provider workflow run completes. It does not prove credentials, authorization, deployment, hostname resolution, served content, diagnosis, treatment, or scientific truth.
